docs.title: About this Plugin
docs.text:
Is it not annoying to see the execution of an action failed, simply because you forgot to install the corresponding package ?

With this plugin, you don't have to think about it :

  • if the package is not installed, action is simply skipped
  • if the package is installed (and match version constraint), action is executed

And more than just and if/else execution strategy, this plugin allow to avoid hard-coding arguments in your action definition.

Learn more with the tutorials section

Caution

Requires CaptainHook 5.28.4 or greater.

docs.title: Tutorials
docs.text:
With many examples on common PHP tools, discover the Plugin features :

  1. How to use the binary-directory option and/or XDG_BIN_HOME env var with Easy-Coding-Standard
  2. How to use the config-directory, config-file and/or XDG_CONFIG_HOME env var with PHPUnit
  3. How to use the ansi-colors-flag option with PHPLint
  4. How to use the *-colors-flag options (auto, always, never) with Mago
  5. How to use the dependency-manager option with PHP_CodeSniffer PHAR distribution

docs.title: Easy-Coding-Standard aka ECS
docs.text: Visit Official Project Site

docs.title: Goals
docs.text: See how to use the binary-directory option and/or XDG_BIN_HOME environment variable.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
Install Command Standard Output 
composer bin ecs update

Note

PHP_CodeSniffer aka PHPCS
docs.text: Visit Official Project Site

docs.title: Goals
docs.text: See how to use the plugin with PHAR tools in PHIVE context.
